title: tat test file
description: Schema for tiny-api-test (tat) JSON test files

env.description: Environment variables — inline object or path to a JSON file

oneOf.description: Path to a JSON file containing environment variables

setup.description: Shell command run before tests. Its JSON stdout is merged into env.

timeout.description: Default request timeout in milliseconds for all tests. Per-test timeout overrides this.

tags.description: Tags used to filter suites via --tag

skip.description: Skip all tests in this suite

tests.description: List of tests in this suite

headers.description: HTTP headers as key-value pairs. Supports {{variable}} interpolation.

body.description: Request body. Objects are sent as JSON with Content-Type: application/json.

assert.description: Assertion expressions evaluated against the response context ($status, $headers, $body, $duration, and body fields spread at root)

capture.description: Extract values from the response to use in later tests via {{variable}} interpolation

response.description: Include response body and/or headers in test output

oneOf.description: Include both response body and headers
Selectively include response body and/or headers

skip.description: Skip this test without failing the run

timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for this test. Overrides the file-level timeout and --timeout flag.
